name: Black-Eyed Pea Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook black-eyed peas according to package directions for 25 minutes, without adding salt or fat.
2. Drain the peas well.
3. Combine the cooked peas, shredded carrot, and celery in a medium bowl.
4. Add fresh parsley, Dijon mustard, white wine vinegar, vegetable oil, sugar, garlic powder, and nutlike cereal nuggets to the bowl.
5. Gently toss all ingredients together.
6. Spoon the mixture into a lettuce-lined bowl.
(Note: This recipe provides about 114 calories per half cup serving.)
